name: Magic War Hammers
description: Hammers +1 and +2 may be hurled as Axes are. The Hammer +3 is a Dwarf's weapon: in a Dwarf's hand it doubles its range to 6", returns to the thrower, strikes for two dice, and gains +3 damage against Giants (5-15 points); in any other hand it throws as a lesser hammer and does not return.
